text: PAGASA posted a rainfall advisory for parts of Luzon today. Check the official bulletin before traveling.

text: DOH reminds the public to get vaccines only from licensed health centers and hospitals.

text: May bagong bulletin ang PAGASA tungkol sa bagyo. Basahin muna ang official update bago mag-share.
